prestazioni: Installation of a **Lamborghini L635 (6.5L V12) bespoke dry-sump racing engine** with a **Motec M150 ECU** reflash optimized for 1,000+ hp on **102-octane race fuel**, utilizing **Mahle Motorsport forged pistons** (12.5:1 compression) and **Carrillo H-beam connecting rods** for sustained 9,500 RPM operation.

Replacement of the OEM **Lamborghini SCV12-specific titanium intake manifold** with a **Weber Motorsport carbon-fiber ram-air intake system**, featuring **individual throttle bodies (ITBs)** and **Bosch Motorsport 82mm throttle plates** for instantaneous throttle response and a 15% increase in airflow at 8,000 RPM.

Integration of a **Pankl Racing Systems 6-speed sequential transaxle** with **AP Racing 4-piston carbon-carbon clutch** and **GKN Driveline CV joints**, paired with a **Hewland LSD (limited-slip differential) with 70% lockup** for optimal power delivery on track-only semi-slick **Pirelli P Zero Trofeo R (315/705-R19 front, 335/705-R20 rear)** tires.
estetica: Installation of a **Novitec Torado SCV12-specific widebody kit** with **carbon-fiber front splitter, rear diffuser, and side skirts**, designed to generate **1,200 kg of downforce at 250 km/h** when paired with the OEM **Lamborghini Aerodinamica Lamborghini Attiva (ALA) 2.0** active aero system.

Replacement of the OEM **carbon-fiber monocoque** with a **Brembo GT3-spec roll cage** (FIA 8862-2018 certified) and **Sabelt 6-point harnesses**, while retaining the **Lamborghini Squadra Corse titanium exhaust system** with **Inconel 625 headers** for a 9,000 RPM scream.

Application of a **3M Scotchcal Matte Black (2080-G10) vinyl wrap** with **Lamborghini Squadra Corse Verde Mantis (PPG DBC9900) accents** on the **carbon-fiber weave**, paired with **OMP carbon-fiber racing seats (8-way adjustable)** and a **MOMO Prototipo steering wheel (380mm diameter, Alcantara grip)** for GT3-level cockpit ergonomics.
